ticket.title: UPDATE SERVICE URL CONFIGURATION FROM LOCALHOST TO DEPLOYED QUICKBOOKS SERVICE URL

test_cases.description: Verify QuickBooks-dependent operations (user sync, invoice creation, etc.) complete successfully in the deployed/test environment.
test_cases.expected_result: Action completes successfully with no connection refused/timeout errors; corresponding record appears in QuickBooks.
test_cases.actual_result: No connection errors; records appeared in QuickBooks

test_cases.description: Confirm no error messages, logs, or failed requests reference localhost or 127.0.0.1 as the target service URL.
test_cases.expected_result: No localhost references appear in any user-facing error output; failures (if any) reference the deployed service.
test_cases.actual_result: No localhost references in error output

test_cases.description: Verify previously passing QuickBooks features (batch user sync, invoice creation, historical sync) still function correctly after the URL configuration change.
test_cases.expected_result: All previously passing behavior continues to work correctly against the new service URL.
test_cases.actual_result: Batch sync, invoicing, and historical sync still functioning

test_cases.description: Verify the deployed service URL points to the correct environment (no cross-environment leakage).
test_cases.expected_result: Data is synced to the correct, intended QuickBooks environment only.
test_cases.actual_result: Data synced to correct environment only

test_cases.description: Verify graceful failure handling if the deployed service URL is temporarily unreachable.
test_cases.expected_result: A clear, user-understandable error is shown or logged; no silent failure or application crash.
test_cases.actual_result: Failures handled gracefully with clear logging

test_cases.description: Verify all QuickBooks-dependent modules (user sync, invoice sync, historical sync, EventBridge cron job) consistently use the same updated deployed service URL.
test_cases.expected_result: All modules consistently connect to the correct deployed URL; none fail due to a stale localhost reference.
test_cases.actual_result: All modules consistently reaching the deployed URL
